description: Query and modify storage (cookies for now) under Site Isolation. Backed by the NetworkProcess-owned cookie store via API::HTTPCookieStore, so cross-origin iframe cookies are visible. The flat read also surfaces partitioned (CHIPS) cookies, each labeled with its partitionKey.

properties.name: session
properties.description: True in case of session cookie.

types.description: Filter parameters for cookie retrieval and deletion. Every provided field narrows the result set.

properties.name: httpOnly
properties.description: If the cookie is HTTP only.

types.description: Identifies the storage partition a cookie belongs to. At least one of 'userContext' or 'sourceOrigin' is present.

properties.name: userContext
properties.description: The user context identifier of the partition.

properties.name: sourceOrigin
properties.description: The serialization of the origin of resources that can access the storage partition.

types.description: The type of storage partition descriptor.
Describes a storage partition. Omit to target the inspected page's default data store. Type 'context' targets the inspected page's main-frame origin.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Marks the Storage domain enabled for this target. No tracking is started; cookies are read on demand from the authoritative store, so this is effectively a no-op kept for domain-lifecycle symmetry.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Marks the Storage domain disabled for this target. Counterpart to enable; a no-op beyond lifecycle bookkeeping.

commands.name: getCookies
commands.description: Retrieves zero or more cookies which match the provided filter, within the given partition.

parameters.name: partition
parameters.description: The storage partition in which to get cookies. Defaults to the origin of the inspected page's main frame.

returns.name: partitionKey
returns.description: The storage partition key the cookies came from.

commands.name: setCookie
commands.description: Creates a new cookie, replacing any cookie in the partition which matches.

parameters.name: partition
parameters.description: The storage partition in which to set the cookie. Defaults to the origin of the inspected page's main frame.

returns.name: partitionKey
returns.description: The storage partition key the cookie was set in.

commands.name: deleteCookies
commands.description: Removes zero or more cookies which match the provided filter, within the given partition. A filter is required; omitting it fails rather than deleting every cookie.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter parameters for cookie deletion. Required in practice: a request with no filter is rejected to avoid an accidental clear of the entire store.

parameters.name: partition
parameters.description: The storage partition in which to delete cookies. Defaults to the origin of the inspected page's main frame.

returns.name: partitionKey
returns.description: The storage partition key the cookies were deleted from.
